response.justification: Candidate is a solid senior/staff full-stack engineer with ~14 years of experience, but the role targets a Director-level Principal Engineer with deep AI/ML expertise, recognized industry standing, and cloud platform strategy experience. The resume shows only recent, peripheral AI exposure (MCP tooling at re:cinq) with no demonstrated AI products, ML research, advanced degree, or director-level influence. Skills lean toward web/backend craftsmanship rather than AI strategy or cloud architecture at scale.
strengths: Broad full-stack experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput services
Strong software craftsmanship culture: TDD, CI/CD, pairing, trunk-based development
Founder of an open-source geo-data platform showing entrepreneurial initiative
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML expertise, products, or recognized thought leadership in AI
Lacks director-level individual contributor scope or strategic advisory experience
No advanced degree and limited cloud platform architecture depth beyond AWS CDK usage

key_factors.factor: Missing AI/ML depth and recognized expertise
No director-level IC or strategic advisory track record
Strong engineering craftsmanship and full-stack breadth
